gist.headline: Automated hive defense
gist.blurb: We've automated our abuse detection to keep the platform fast and reliable. Spam gets weeded out automatically, leaving more compute for your actual projects.
gist.summary: Introduced automated cron jobs and time-filtering flags to the abuse detection system to proactively manage platform resources.
gist.impact: Legitimate users will experience more consistent performance as automated systems now continuously identify and mitigate spam traffic.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations.ai bee mascot acting as a friendly gardener weeding a digital garden. A cute chunky robot companion scanning the area with a magnifying glass. Metaphor: weeding the garden to let the good plants (legitimate users) grow.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, happily pulling a digital weed from a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a magnifying glass, screen glowing softly. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
